case_title: FLORFINA DIAZ MENDOZA VS. ELENA RAVAGO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, FLORFINA DIAZ AS TO DEFENDANT RAVAGO, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY MENDOZA, FLORFINA DIAZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAVAGO, ELENA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2008 - JUDGMENT. PALINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, FLORFINA DIAZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAVAGO, ELENA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,480.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF SHOWED THAT SHE ISSUED LOAN IS DUE REPAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
